title: hieracium picroides subsp. christii
intro: Hieracium picroides subsp. christii, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or Christ's hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium picroides subsp. christii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
